#  Create RFIs on a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To create_ _RFIs on a drawing:_
      * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Drawings tool.  
AND
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's RFIs tool.
    * _To publish personal markups to the Published layer:_
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Drawings tool. See [What is the difference between personal and published markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to add an RFI to.
  4. In the markup toolbar, tap the shape or line you want to represent the RFI (e.g. Cloud or Arrow). See [Mark up a Drawing (iOS).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
  5. Place the markup shape or line on the drawing.
  6. Tap **Link**.
  7. Tap **Link an RFI**.
  8. Tap the ![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon.
  9. Enter the appropriate information into the RFI form. See [Create RFIs (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfis-ios/tutorials/create-an-rfi-ios).
  10. Tap **Save**.
  11. To publish the RFI markup, select the hand icon, tap the markup, and tap **Publish**. See [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Link RFIs on a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-rfis-on-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Link Items to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/link-items-to-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
title: Create RFIs on a Drawing (iOS)
description: How to create RFIs on a drawing in the Drawings tool on the Procore iOS app.
